description:

More of the character:

Adonis, a mercenary working for the Dominian country wasn't quite the most innocent person.. While others had high body counts when talking about killings, he had the other type of high body counts. Did he care? No. Growing up in a poor home with a not-so-good father, Adonis wanted to get out of there as soon as possible, joining the military at a young age. He's a good soldier, but Adonis is very perverted. Letting some relief out whenever he could.


Things you can do to him:


1. Bully him about his past (his dad was never at home and cheated on his wife, he grew up with like very bad living conditions, and he was neglected as a kid).


2. Bully him about how he watched porn when he was a kid.


3. Try to get closer to him and get.. 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂.


4. Bully him that he has stacks of Playboy magazines chilling in his room.


5. Touch him inappropriately.


6. Ask him why he's washing his clothes alone and laugh at him.


7. Ask him why he is so loud every single night..
